overall.description: Game engine footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting students practicing broom flight in a walled grassy field, followed by a third-person perspective of a student walking through a stone archway and covered bridge toward the main Hogwarts castle. The clip transitions from a static observation scene to a walking exploration sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled training field for broom practice

events.description: student on broom flies low across the field from right to left

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing students practicing broom flight maneuvers in the training field

notable_agents.action: student hovering on broomstick near the ground
group of students flying in loose formation across the field

entered.detail: tall stone walls enclosing the training field with crenellations
tall wooden tower with pointed roof attached to the wall
blue-grey stone tower with conical roof in the center background
large grassy field where students practice flying
green forested mountains visible above the walls

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grassy training field enclosed by high stone walls and wooden towers. Several students in dark robes practice flying on broomsticks, hovering and moving across the field under bright midday sun. The camera remains stationary, capturing the scattered flight patterns of the students against the backdrop of forested mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach path to castle entrance through covered bridge

events.description: perspective shifts from static observation to third-person following a student walking toward the castle
character enters the covered stone bridge passage with wooden railings
character exits the covered bridge into the open castle courtyard

agents.ego_description: student in grey robes with red trim walking steadily toward the castle entrance and through the covered bridge

notable_agents.action: student running ahead toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance draped with decorative tapestries
enclosed stone passage with wooden railings connecting the field to the castle
massive gothic castle with multiple spires and towers
tall vertical banners with house crests on poles
cobblestone pathway leading toward the main castle doors

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a student walking across the grass toward a large stone archway entrance. The character passes through a covered stone bridge with wooden railings before emerging into a sunlit courtyard. Hogwarts castle rises ahead with its distinctive spires, while decorative house banners line the approach path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a wide observation of a flying training ground into a first-person journey toward the towering spires of Hogwarts castle. It begins with a static view of students in dark robes hovering on broomsticks within a grassy field enclosed by high stone walls and wooden towers under a bright midday sun. As the perspective shifts, the camera begins to move, following a student across the grass and through a large stone archway. The scene then leads through a covered stone bridge with wooden railings before emerging into a sunlit courtyard. Finally, the view opens up to reveal the massive castle rising ahead, with decorative house banners lining the path toward the architecture.
